topic: My bedroom window is open every morning, though I lock it every night.
title: The Window I Lock Every Night | True Scary Story

scenes.narration: Every morning my bedroom window stood wide open.
scenes.image_prompt: still photograph of an open bedroom window with curtains drifting inward, pale dawn light, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: My room is on the third floor above a busy street.
scenes.image_prompt: still photograph of an upper floor window seen from outside a building at night, dim glow within, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: I lock that window tight before bed. Every night.
scenes.image_prompt: still photograph of a hand turning a window latch closed, dim lamp light, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: There is no ledge below, no way to climb.
scenes.image_prompt: still photograph of a sheer building wall beneath a window, no ledge, dim street far below, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: The first morning the cold air woke me at dawn.
scenes.image_prompt: still photograph of a bed near an open window with curtains lifting, grey morning light, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: The latch was undone, the curtains pushed aside.
scenes.image_prompt: still photograph of an unlatched window with curtains held open, deep shadow at the sill, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: I screwed the frame shut and tested it twice.
scenes.image_prompt: still photograph of a screwdriver fixing a window frame, dim room, low light, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: By morning the screws lay on the sill, the window open.
scenes.image_prompt: still photograph of loose screws resting on a windowsill beside an open window, pale light, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: There were faint damp footprints on the inside floor.
scenes.image_prompt: still photograph of faint wet footprints leading from a window across floorboards, dim morning light, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: They led to my bed, then simply stopped.
scenes.image_prompt: still photograph of damp footprints ending at the foot of a bed, low light, deep shadow, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: I sealed the window with boards the very next day.
scenes.image_prompt: still photograph of wooden boards nailed across a bedroom window, dim grey daylight, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: Now the footprints start at my bed and lead out.
scenes.image_prompt: still photograph of damp footprints leading away from a bed toward a boarded window, low light, vertical 9:16 framing
